policy: Registration is not approval. A source is usable only when the exact asset has proven provenance and redistribution rights.

sources.name: PokéAPI
sources.type: structured CSV data and English prose
sources.declaredOwnership: Retain the BSD-3-Clause notice and credit PokéAPI contributors.
sources.knownConflict: Trademark, character-name, and underlying franchise rights are not granted by the software license.
sources.attributionRequired: Retain the BSD-3-Clause notice and credit PokéAPI contributors.
sources.recommendation: audit and canonical reference; runtime adoption needs an explicit baseline decision

sources.name: PokéAPI Sprites
sources.owner: PokéAPI contributors, official-image rippers, Smogon community, and named fan artists by collection
sources.maintainer: PokéAPI contributors, official-image rippers, Smogon community, and named fan artists by collection
sources.generationsOrGames: Multiple official generations and community continuations
sources.declaredLicense: Repository states CC0 while also stating that image contents are Copyright The Pokémon Company.
sources.declaredOwnership: The source names The Pokémon Company and collection-specific community artists.
sources.knownConflict: The apparent licensor may not control all underlying image rights; no hotlinking or runtime use is approved.
sources.attributionRequired: The source names The Pokémon Company and collection-specific community artists.
sources.recommendation: metadata inventory only; four temporary sprites per species remain isolated under D-023

sources.name: PokéAPI Cries
sources.owner: PokéAPI maintainers; files sourced from Pokémon Showdown and Veekun
sources.maintainer: PokéAPI maintainers; files sourced from Pokémon Showdown and Veekun
sources.declaredLicense: Repository states CC0 while also stating that audio contents are Copyright The Pokémon Company.
sources.declaredOwnership: The repository names The Pokémon Company as copyright owner.
sources.knownConflict: The apparent licensor may not control the underlying audio rights; binaries are not approved for import.
sources.attributionRequired: The repository names The Pokémon Company as copyright owner.

sources.name: The Pokémon Company
sources.type: official names, descriptions, images, and franchise presentation
sources.knownConflict: Manual comparison only; do not copy images, audio, or prose.

sources.name: Bulbapedia
sources.declaredLicense: Not evaluated for bulk reuse in this audit.
sources.declaredOwnership: Site- and page-specific; no asset reuse assumed.
sources.knownConflict: Manual divergence checks only; never a media import source and no bulk scraping.
sources.attributionRequired: Site- and page-specific; no asset reuse assumed.

sources.name: Serebii
sources.knownConflict: Manual divergence checks only; never a media import source and no bulk scraping.

sources.name: Pokémon Database
sources.declaredOwnership: The site attributes Pokémon names and images to Nintendo/Game Freak.
sources.knownConflict: Manual reference only; no hotlink, bulk scraping, or media import.
sources.attributionRequired: The site attributes Pokémon names and images to Nintendo/Game Freak.

sources.name: Pokémon Showdown
sources.type: TypeScript source and structured mechanics data
sources.knownConflict: The server code license does not grant rights to Pokémon artwork, cries, names, or separately hosted resources.
sources.recommendation: independent mechanics cross-check only; no code copied in this audit

sources.name: Pokémon Showdown Client
sources.owner: Pokémon Showdown contributors and individual sprite artists
sources.maintainer: Pokémon Showdown contributors and individual sprite artists
sources.declaredLicense: AGPL-3.0 covers client code; the repository expressly excludes /audio and /sprites resources.
sources.declaredOwnership: Collection- and artist-specific; permission must be proven.
sources.knownConflict: Do not infer an asset license from the client or server code license.
sources.attributionRequired: Collection- and artist-specific; permission must be proven.

sources.name: Kenney
sources.type: game assets with per-pack license files
sources.declaredLicense: Kenney states asset-page packs are CC0.
sources.declaredOwnership: Not required for CC0 packs; attribution is recommended.
sources.knownConflict: Suitable for generic replacements only; verify each downloaded pack's bundled license.
sources.attributionRequired: Not required for CC0 packs; attribution is recommended.

sources.name: OpenGameArt
sources.declaredOwnership: Varies by CC0, CC-BY, CC-BY-SA, OGA-BY, or GPL.
sources.knownConflict: Verify exact uploader, provenance, license version, attribution, share-alike, and DRM implications.
sources.attributionRequired: Varies by CC0, CC-BY, CC-BY-SA, OGA-BY, or GPL.
sources.recommendation: discovery only until each asset is reviewed

sources.name: Freesound
sources.type: audio under per-file Creative Commons terms
sources.declaredLicense: Per file; CC0 and CC-BY are potential candidates.
sources.knownConflict: Avoid NC for a durable commercial-capable project; verify that the uploader created or lawfully recorded the sound.
sources.recommendation: discovery only until each sound is reviewed

sources.name: itch.io Game Assets
sources.declaredOwnership: Defined by each package and purchase receipt.
sources.knownConflict: Record package page, author, exact license, receipt, modification, redistribution, and attribution terms.
sources.attributionRequired: Defined by each package and purchase receipt.
sources.recommendation: discovery only until each package is reviewed

sources.name: Phaser
sources.type: audio loader and Sound Manager documentation
